title: Keyframe Animations
description: Create a loading spinner using CSS keyframe animations with rotation and color changes

validationRules.message: Loading text should use the pulse animation

hints.text: @keyframes defines animation steps. The animation shorthand property applies it to an element with duration, timing, and iteration count.
Define @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } and apply with 'animation: spin 1s linear infinite'. Make the spinner circular with border-radius: 50%.
Create a circle with one colored border side, apply infinite rotation, and add a pulsing opacity animation to the text.
hints.code:
.spinner { width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 4px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border-top-color: #007bff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 1s linear infinite; }
@keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
